summary: Critical workflow issues prevent execution: (1) permissions: contents: read (must be write to update VERSION/CHANGELOG files), (2) actions/checkout@v4 not SHA-pinned (task explicitly requires full commit SHA + release date), (3) SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 referenced but missing. PowerShell code follows Set-StrictMode/error conventions well, but semantic-version-bumper.psm1 duplicates commit-type regex patterns across lines ~42, ~60, ~100, ~118—should extract to helper functions. Workflow structure logical, test harness reasonable, but non-functional without fixes.
